completed: Memoized useApi hook functions (request, setData) to prevent infinite loops
Memoized FacultyList queryKeys to stabilize React Query dependencies
Stabilized Navbar imports by removing legacy icons causing Vite 500 errors
pending: Final validation of bulk operations in FacultyList

decisions.decision: Memoize both the 'request' function in useApi and the 'queryKey' object in FacultyList
decisions.trade_offs: Slightly more boilerplate in components but ensures production-grade stability and prevents memory leaks/CPU thrashes.
